title: Lesser & Pavey LP42478A Little Stars Vehicles Beaker
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 Piece Vehicle Children Beaker Drinking Cup | 10 oz
COLORFUL DESIGN: This adorable drinking cup features different Cars in a Bright and colorful design that will surely add excitement and pleasure to mealtime for your little boys.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: This adorable drinking cup makes a wonderful present for little boys for any occasion. Best paired with soup bowl, Plate, food tray and Cutlery set with the same design.
HIGH QUALITY: This adorable drinking cup is made of Premium quality Plastic. It is lightweight but still very durable and 100% food-safe for children's use.
SAFE FOR KIDS: This adorable drinking cup beaker is reusable and BPA-free making it safe for kids' meals.
description: From the manufacturer About us Established in 1971 by chairman and co-founder Ronnie Pavey, Lesser & Pavey have become one of the leading UK Trade Supplier of Giftware & Homewares. By priding ourselves on fantastic quality at great value for money, our brand "The Leonardo Collection" has become renowned worldwide. There's a huge range of Homeware, Ladies & Gents, Novelty and Souvenir gifts, plus seasonal lines for Birthdays, Christmas, Weddings and more. Whilst walking round, something is bound to catch your eye also which you might have otherwise missed.
